data.body: f698 (kakarikis) docs complete: added '### Dogfooding a project portability guard' subsection to docs/plan-review-gate.md (outside the parsed move table) + updated project-extensible paragraph schema + tests/unit/test_project_portability_docs.py (11 tests GREEN, parity test still green). Committed f43d01602. Rebased whole stack onto origin/main 43d154523 (3 upstream commits: jira-link fix + identity event-signing; clean rebase; re-pushed 748/749/750 as new patchsets). Full 4-change stack: 748 3863, 749 2ad8, 750 21dd, +f698 (not yet pushed pending full-suite gate). Running full CI-equivalent suite now. STILL PENDING: user decision on 21dd live-eval blocker (bug 2340).
